name: Bear
description: Solitary apex predator. Avoids people unless provoked, cornered, or hungry.

sensory.sight: a dark shape among the trees, larger than you expected, absolutely still
sensory.sound: heavy breathing, the crack of a branch under something massive
sensory.feel: the ground vibrates slightly with each step

encounter_hooks: claw marks on tree trunks, eight feet up
a ransacked campsite with tooth marks on containers
a salmon stream with fresh tracks in the mud
notes: Bears don't want to fight you. Make noise, give them an exit, and they'll take it. A mother with cubs is the exception — she fights until you're gone or dead.
